calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioners: Kim Van Nguyen, Thang Dac Nguyen, Vinh Dac Nguyen, present, in pro per with Charles Zhang, Cantonese Interpreter were sworn and examined. Also, Petitioner: Kim Van Nguyen in pro per, as Guardian Ad Litem for and with the Minor: Tien Dac Nguyen and Charles Zhang, Cantonese Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name as follows:
Kim Van Nguyen to Kim Van Vu.
Thang Dac Nguyen to Thang Dac Vu
Vinh Dac Nguyen to Vinh Dac Vu
Tien Dac Nguyen to Tien Dac Vu
Decree signed in open court.
